name: Chocolate Almond Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the butter and chocolate in a bowl.
2. Set over hot water and stir until melted.
3. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
4. Stir in sugar until dissolved.
5. Gradually stir in salt, cream, vanilla, almond extract, and chopped almonds.
6. Set over hot water and stir until thoroughly blended.
7. Serve warm, slightly chilled, or at room temperature.
